Description: Draft feature for ranking representatives within each day and producing shortlists.

Stories.StoryDescription: Rank representative photos within each day according to the configured scoring rules.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Each day can produce an ordered shortlist of candidate photos.

Stories.StoryDescription: Handle days with few or zero acceptable candidates without failing the selection flow.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The day-level ranking flow supports sparse and empty days safely.
